summary: Completed testing of 3 bug fixes: 1) Backend /api/predictions/me/detailed endpoint KeyError 'votes' fix - WORKING ✅, 2) Match card interactions and vote button display-only behavior - PARTIALLY WORKING ⚠️, 3) Quick Prediction shortcut and 'Predict Match' button rename - WORKING ✅

ui_bugs.issue: Vote buttons still have cursor: pointer instead of cursor: default
ui_bugs.details: Vote buttons should be display-only but still show pointer cursor. CSS class should include 'cursor-default' instead of 'cursor-pointer'

integration_issues.issue: User session appears to be lost during navigation/testing
integration_issues.details: User successfully logs in but session seems to expire or get lost during page navigation

passed_tests: Backend /api/predictions/me/detailed endpoint returns 200 with predictions data (no KeyError: 'votes')
Predictions page loads without 'Something went wrong. Could not load predictions' error
Admin login works with correct credentials (farhad.isgandar@gmail.com)
Advanced Options modal opens with Exact Score, Smart Advice, Invite Friend, Friends Activity tabs
Vote buttons (1, X, 2) do not change appearance on click
Backend health check and system metrics working
Football API endpoints working (competitions, matches, leaderboard)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix vote button cursor styling - change from 'cursor-pointer' to 'cursor-default' in VoteButton component CSS classes. Investigate user session persistence issue during navigation.
